summary.name: VIX Predicts Stock Index Returns
summary.author: Jared Broad
summary.description: The strategy is a single asset, volatility regime signal that uses the level of implied equity volatility to time exposure to a US large cap equity index proxy. Each day it observes the CBOE VIX and compares the current reading to its trailing distribution over an approximately two year lookback (default 504 trading days). When VIX is in the upper tail (above the configured high percentile, default 90th), the model issues a bullish 12 month expected return signal for the equity instrument (OEF).
summary.description_full:
The strategy is a single asset, volatility regime signal that uses the level of implied equity volatility to time exposure to a US large cap equity index proxy. Each day it observes the CBOE VIX and compares the current reading to its trailing distribution over an approximately two year lookback (default 504 trading days). When VIX is in the upper tail (above the configured high percentile, default 90th), the model issues a bullish 12 month expected return signal for the equity instrument (OEF). When VIX is in the lower tail (below the configured low percentile, default 10th), it issues a bearish 12 month signal. The intended edge is contrarian mean reversion in equity risk premia: unusually high implied volatility is treated as forward return supportive, while unusually low implied volatility is treated as forward return adverse.

The investable universe is fixed to OEF, with raw price data and daily VIX inputs. Portfolio construction targets equal weight across active insights and rebalances on a weekly schedule; execution is immediate. There are no explicit risk overlays (no stop losses, volatility targeting, or drawdown constraints), and leverage/margin constraints are effectively relaxed, so risk is primarily governed by the presence and direction of the VIX extreme signal and the cadence of weekly rebalancing.

raw.name: VIX Predicts Stock Index Returns

author.name: Jared Broad
author.bio: We are pioneering the radically future for open-source quant finance. QuantConnect is the world's largest quant community, empowering more than 400,000 quants with a framework, data, and infrastructure for their investments.

changes: Initial deployment for strategy VIX Predicts Stock Index Returns.
